item.title: About
item.description: My name is Pierce Bartine. I’m an SRE working in Palo Alto, California for Salesforce. My goal is to become good at whatever currently has my attention; there are so many disparate bodies of knowledge out there that I can’t help but want to connect them! Really, I just love learning, (mostly) regardless of the topic. Though a chemical engineer on paper, exposure to Linux at an early age pretty much sealed my fate.

item.title: Debugging a Slow DynamoDB Query
item.description: Debugging why the first few queries to DynamoDB a .NET app makes are slow

item.title: Debugging AirPods on Linux
item.description: Getting AirPods bluetooth audio working on Arch Linux

item.title: Docker Privileged Mode Semantics
item.description: Reference on what Docker's privileged mode actually does to a container

item.title: Security Groups in Terraform
item.description: There are two ways to define AWS security groups in Terraform, and they are not equal

item.title: On QBism
item.description: Aka Quantum Bayesianism, it's all about gathering evidence and updating your beliefs

item.title: On Logarithms
item.description: Logarithms are way more interesting beneath the surface

item.title: Analyzing a Codebase
item.description: Some interesting metrics to run on source text before compilation
